bullet_points: Load the dataset, treating '.' as NaN.
Identify and print exact column names for QHD, QKB, and QDF blocks.
Perform mappings for binary, ordinal, and frequency variables; encode QGR (1–4) and QGN (1–5) as ordinals.
Construct composite indices for Job Security and Nature of Work; create "Income Rank" by normalizing within countries.
One-hot encode nominal variables (QDA, QDB, QDH, HIDDG) and save both raw-encoded and dummy-encoded versions.
Print missing data rates per key variable and distributions of composite indices.
Load the processed dataset.
Perform EFA on 16 binary QHD items using polychoric correlation.
Print KMO statistic and Bartlett’s test p-value.
Generate and save a scree plot of eigenvalues.
Extract factors, print factor loadings, calculate Cronbach’s alpha, and save factor scores to the dataset.
Use current and future Job Security indices as indicators for LCA.
Estimate 2–5 class models; print model comparison table (log-likelihood, AIC, BIC, Entropy).
Generate and save a plot of class-conditional response probabilities for QEA_2 and QEB_2.
Print class size proportions and average posterior probabilities; assign and save class labels.
sub_tasks.sub_task: Latent Class Analysis (LCA) for Job Security Trajectories

bullet_points: Perform multinomial logistic regression (reference: "Stagnant Neutral") predicting class membership.
Include interaction terms between QKB_1_11 and QKB_1_4.
Calculate VIFs; perform 5-fold cross-validation.
Print full regression table (standardized coefficients, odds ratios, 95% CIs, FDR-corrected p-values) and save to CSV.
Perform sensitivity analysis (excluding "Not sure" responses) and compare coefficients to the full model.

Generate a multi-panel figure: (a) latent class profiles, (b) marginal effects plot for QKB_1_11 × QKB_1_4 interaction, (c) coefficient forest plot of odds ratios, and (d) bar chart of class membership proportions.
Ensure all labels are visible and save as a high-resolution PNG.
Synthesize quantitative findings, explicitly referencing BIC, entropy, odds ratios, interaction effects, and cross-validation accuracy.

Structure the report with subsections: (1) Affective Disposition Factor Structure, (2) Latent Class Solution and Trajectory Profiles, (3) Multinomial Regression Predictors of Class Membership, (4) Interaction Effects of Organizational Catalysts, and (5) Robustness and Sensitivity Checks.
Interpret the impact of organizational catalysts and the interaction between training and involvement on job security perceptions.
